results.1: Master the AI tools that top brands are already using today
results.2: Build a portfolio from real projects - work that people pay for
results.3: Get your first paying orders while still studying

results.promise: And all this - without design experience, without upfront investment and without feeling that you are late.
results.promise2: The right time to start is now.
about.label: About the author
about.p1: 7 years in marketing - from office SMM to my own agency. I know what burnout and an income ceiling feel like.
about.p2: 9 months ago I changed direction completely - went all-in on AI content. Today I earn €3,000-5,000 per month, work with major brands and grow this niche in Moldova.
about.p3: I built AI AI CONTENT because I see it every day: huge demand and almost no competition. 2026 is a window of opportunity - businesses are looking for people who save them time, nerves and money. That is exactly what AI creators do. I want you to enter this niche among the first - while the market is still waiting for you.
about.brands.label: Brands I have worked with
reviews.label: Reviews
reviews.title: What my students say
reviews.subtitle: Real people. Real results.
rev.1.name: Diana
rev.1.quote: "I was impressed by Sofia's expertise despite her age. Explanations are simple and to the point - right after a lesson you want to create. The support and comfort here is rare on other courses."
rev.2.name: Eva
rev.2.quote: "The best course I have ever taken - because of the real connection with the mentor. You feel they invest in you, not just sold you a product. For ~€30 a month I got knowledge I used to pay €150 for and walk away with nothing."
rev.3.name: Julia
rev.3.quote: "This is the first course I have ever purchased - and it met expectations 100%. Recurring clients appeared while I was still studying, and I am in talks with new ones."
rev.4.name: Angelina
rev.4.quote: "Sofia is not just a teacher - you can come to her as a mentor and a great human. Very different from the market full of $50 courses that teach nothing. Expectations fully met."
rev.5.name: Arina
rev.5.quote: "Best money I have spent in years - expectations were exceeded. The course is not just informative, it feels good. My personal rating - infinity out of 10."
portfolio.label: My work
portfolio.title: What I create for brands
case.label: Case
step.1.title: AI-creator mindset
step.1.desc: Before creating - we lay the foundation. You'll get a mindset system, a clear plan to your first money and the inner drive that keeps you going.
step.2.title: Visual taste & style
step.2.desc: You learn to see strong visuals and tell them apart from weak ones. You shape your own visual style - the foundation for everything you'll create next.
step.3.title: Prompts & AI assistant
step.3.desc: You master a prompt-writing system that works on the first try. You build a personal AI assistant that does the work for you.
step.4.title: Creating photography
step.4.desc: You work with light, generation platforms and craft a detailed character that looks like a real person. AI photoshoots and product photography - without leaving home.
step.5.title: Creating video
step.5.desc: You produce a full commercial video, edit it in CapCut and add sound. The most in-demand AI-content service - and you will own it.
step.6.title: Sales & first clients
step.6.desc: You learn real AI-content pricing, get messaging templates and learn to close any objection - from "too expensive" to "let me think".
step.7.title: Portfolio & Diploma
step.7.desc: You build a strong client-ready portfolio, defend your diploma project and get a live review with a roadmap for your next steps.
